cases.prompt: Review the design plan before we implement it

assertions.text: Rates each design dimension 0-10 and explains what would make it a 10.
Interactively fixes the plan to raise the ratings, working in plan mode.

cases.prompt: 구현 전에 이 plan의 UI/UX를 디자인 관점에서 비평해줘

assertions.text: Performs an interactive designer's-eye plan review (like CEO/Eng review) rather than auditing a live site.
Scores design dimensions and proposes concrete improvements to the plan.

cases.prompt: 이미 배포된 사이트 시각적으로 감사하고 고쳐줘

assertions.text: Recognizes live-site visual audits belong to /design-review, not plan-mode review.
